clue_empty_fridge.name: Empty Fridge Clue
clue_empty_fridge.description: Evidence that someone stole Fred's pasta and potatoes from his fridge. Freddista is the prime suspect.

flavor_karaoke.name: Karaoke Memory
flavor_karaoke.description: A fond memory of last night's karaoke session. Fred's neighbors are less fond of it.

flavor_photo.name: Old Photo
flavor_photo.description: A dusty photo of two young tennis shoes playing together. One face is scribbled over. Who was it?

flavor_signpost.name: Signpost Info
flavor_signpost.description: You memorized the directions. Shoelace Forest is south. Breakfastopia is... somewhere.

food_breadroll.name: Stale Breadroll
food_breadroll.description: A slightly stale breadroll from Sal's Surplus. Still edible. Probably.

onUse.successMessage: You chew the stale breadroll. It tastes like cardboard, but your HP is restored!

food_potato.name: Wild Potato
food_potato.description: A fresh potato found in the forest. Delicious and restorative.

onUse.successMessage: You devour the Wild Potato. Your HP is fully restored!

weapon_stick.name: Sturdy Stick
weapon_stick.description: A solid branch from a shoe-tree. Good for whacking snakes.

onUse.successMessage: WHACK! You swing the stick with all your might!

tool_lantern.name: Old Lantern
tool_lantern.description: A battered lantern from Freddista's shack. It gives off a faint, warm glow.

onUse.failureMessage: The lantern illuminates the area, but there's nothing interesting to see there!

quest_note.name: Freddista's Note
quest_note.description: A crumpled note from Freddista: 'Day 4,382. Still alone. They say my stare kills. It doesn't.'

tool_flashlight.name: Flashlight
tool_flashlight.description: A sturdy flashlight with full batteries. Useful for seeing hidden things in the dark.

map_electric_desert.name: Map of the Electric Desert
map_electric_desert.description: A scribbled map pointing towards the treacherous Electric Desert.

food_ultra_potato.name: Ultra Golden Potato
food_ultra_potato.description: A radiant, golden potato that hums with starchy energy. It looks far too precious to eat, but Fred's stomach says otherwise.

onUse.successMessage: You consume the Ultra Golden Potato. A surge of pure, starchy energy flows through you! Your HP is boosted to 50!

tool_magnifying_glass.name: Magnifying Glass
tool_magnifying_glass.description: A thick glass lens with a brass handle. It makes small things look large, or can focus light into a burning point.

onUse.successMessage: You hold the magnifying glass up to the sun. A beam of intense light hits Barry's metal casing! It starts to smoke and glow!
onUse.failureMessage: You try to focus the light, but Barry isn't in a good position for it.

tool_electric_lantern.name: Electric Lantern
tool_electric_lantern.description: A high-tech lantern found in the Electric Desert. It hums with a steady, blue glow.

onUse.successMessage: The electric lantern's blue light pierces the gloom!
onUse.failureMessage: The blue light reveals nothing hidden here.

quest_strong_shoelace.name: Strong Shoelace
quest_strong_shoelace.description: A thick, durable shoelace found in the Secret Cave. It's strong enough to tie anything together — maybe even a broken bridge.

ability_zap_immunity.name: Rubber Boots
ability_zap_immunity.description: Thick rubber boots that grant Zap Immunity.

onUse.successMessage: You equip the Rubber Boots. You are now immune to electric damage!

consumable_double_damage.name: Spicy Pepper
consumable_double_damage.description: A very spicy pepper. Eat it for Double Damage for 3 turns.

onUse.successMessage: You eat the Spicy Pepper! Your attacks will deal double damage for 3 turns!

consumable_energy_drink.name: Sparking Energy Drink
consumable_energy_drink.description: A fizzing can of liquid lightning. Drink it to cleanse debuffs and restore 3 HP.

onUse.successMessage: You chug the energy drink! The tingling washes away your fatigue. +3 HP, all debuffs cleared!

spicy_noodles.name: Spicy Noodles
spicy_noodles.description: Exotic and very spicy noodles from the factory. Hot enough to melt ice!

suitable_potato.name: Suitable Potato
suitable_potato.description: A rare, non-rotten potato from the Great Farm. It looks almost too perfect.

quest_note_forest.name: Hidden Message
quest_note_forest.description: A wet note stuck to the wall. It says: 'The path to the desert is guarded by a battery. Bring something shiny.'

item_energy_crystal.name: Energy Crystal
item_energy_crystal.description: A pulsing blue crystal harvested from a capacitor. It hums with raw static power.

item_silver_eyelet.name: Silver Eyelet
item_silver_eyelet.description: A polished silver eyelet, gleaming in the light. It's remarkably durable and fits shoelaces perfectly.

item_berries.name: Rubber Berries
item_berries.description: Soft, bouncy berries that grow on Shoelace Forest trees. They are completely inedible but useful for synthesis.

item_pollen.name: Yellow Pollen
item_pollen.description: Fine golden spores gathered from the forest floor. It has a sweet, aromatic scent.

item_pillow.name: Soft Pillow
item_pillow.description: A tiny pillow made of a single cotton ball. Soft and cloud-like to the touch.

item_rubber.name: Rubber Piece
item_rubber.description: A piece of vulcanized rubber scrap. It's highly elastic and resistant to electricity.

item_mushrooms.name: Glowing Mushrooms
item_mushrooms.description: Bioluminescent forest mushrooms that cast a faint green light. They pulse with organic energy.

item_vine.name: Pulsing Vine
item_vine.description: A thick, green forest vine that seems to twitch slightly when touched. It has strong structural properties.

item_forest_spud.name: Forest Spud
item_forest_spud.description: A tiny forest potato, covered in rich soil. Unlike wild potatoes, it has uniquely dense starch.

item_magnifying_lens.name: Magnifying Lens
item_magnifying_lens.description: A highly polished glass lens that focuses ambient light. Perfect for studying tiny details.

item_shiny_reflector.name: Shiny Reflector
item_shiny_reflector.description: A curved metallic dish that maximizes light emission. It looks like it was scavenged from an old torch.
